questions.question_en: Was the crop exposed to prolonged moisture before harvest (e.g., delayed harvesting after maturity)?
questions.question_sw: Je, mazao yalikumbwa na unyevu mwingi kabla ya kuvuna (kwa mfano, kuchelewa kuvuna baada ya kukomaa)?
questions.help_en: Prolonged field moisture before harvest increases the chance of mould starting before grain even enters storage.
questions.help_sw: Unyevu mwingi shambani kabla ya kuvuna huongeza hatari ya ukungu kuanza kabla nafaka haijaingia hifadhi.

questions.question_en: Is there evidence of pest or bird damage on the standing crop?
questions.question_sw: Je, kuna dalili za uharibifu wa wadudu au ndege kwenye mazao yaliyosimama?
questions.help_en: Damaged grain from pests or birds creates entry points for mould spores.
questions.help_sw: Nafaka iliyoharibiwa na wadudu au ndege hufungua njia za kuingia kwa viini vya ukungu.

questions.question_en: Was the grain harvested during or immediately after rain?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka ilivunwa wakati wa mvua au mara baada ya mvua?
questions.help_en: Harvesting wet grain forces you to dry it more aggressively and quickly to prevent mould.
questions.help_sw: Kuvuna nafaka yenye unyevu kunahitaji kukausha haraka na kwa nguvu zaidi ili kuzuia ukungu.

questions.question_en: Was harvesting equipment or surface visibly dirty with soil or previous crop residue?
questions.question_sw: Je, vifaa vya kuvuna au sehemu ya kuvunia ilikuwa na uchafu wa udongo au mabaki ya mazao ya awali?
questions.help_en: Soil and plant debris can carry mould spores directly onto fresh grain.
questions.help_sw: Udongo na mabaki ya mimea vinaweza kupeleka viini vya ukungu moja kwa moja kwenye nafaka mpya.

questions.question_en: Was drying delayed by more than 24 hours after harvest?
questions.question_sw: Je, ukaushaji ulicheleweshwa kwa zaidi ya saa 24 baada ya kuvuna?
questions.help_en: Delaying drying gives mould a head start. Prompt drying is the single most effective prevention step.
questions.help_sw: Kuchelewesha ukaushaji kunapa ukungu muda wa kuanza. Ukaushaji wa haraka ndiyo hatua muhimu zaidi ya kuzuia.

questions.question_en: Is the grain being dried directly on bare soil or a dirty surface?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka inakaushwa moja kwa moja kwenye udongo tupu au sehemu chafu?
questions.help_en: Drying on soil picks up moisture and mould spores from the ground. Use a tarp, mat, or clean concrete.
questions.help_sw: Kukausha kwenye udongo kunachukua unyevu na viini vya ukungu kutoka ardhini. Tumia turubai, mkeka, au sakafu ya saruji safi.

questions.question_en: Was the grain not stirred or turned regularly during drying?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka haikukorogwa au kugeuzwa mara kwa mara wakati wa ukaushaji?
questions.help_en: Turning grain during drying ensures even moisture reduction and prevents hidden damp pockets.
questions.help_sw: Kugeuza nafaka wakati wa ukaushaji kunahakikisha unyevu unapungua sawasawa na kuzuia mafungu ya unyevu.

questions.question_en: Did shelling or milling happen before grain was fully dry?
questions.question_sw: Je, kupukua au kusaga kulifanyika kabla nafaka haijakauka kabisa?
questions.help_en: Processing damp grain damages the outer layer and exposes the kernel to mould.
questions.help_sw: Kusindika nafaka yenye unyevu kunaharibu gamba la nje na kuufanya punje ya ndani iwe wazi kwa ukungu.

questions.question_en: Is the processing area clean and free of mouldy debris from previous batches?
questions.question_sw: Je, eneo la kusindikia ni safi na halina mabaki ya ukungu kutoka kwa vikundi vya awali?
questions.help_en: Previous batch debris can contaminate the new batch. Clean between runs.
questions.help_sw: Mabaki ya kundi la awali yanaweza kuchafua kundi jipya. Safisha vifaa kati ya usindikaji.

questions.question_en: Is the storage container or room damp, leaking, or poorly ventilated?
questions.question_sw: Je, chombo cha kuhifadhi au chumba kina unyevu, kinavuja, au hakina uingizaji hewa wa kutosha?
questions.help_en: Moisture in storage is one of the fastest ways to lose grain to mould. Keep the store dry and aired.
questions.help_sw: Unyevu kwenye hifadhi ni njia ya haraka ya kupoteza nafaka kwa ukungu. Weka hifadhi kavu na yenye hewa ya kutosha.

questions.question_en: Are there visible signs of mould, discolouration, or shrivelled grain in the stored batch?
questions.question_sw: Je, kuna dalili zinazoonekana za ukungu, kubadilika rangi, au nafaka iliyonyauka kwenye kundi lililohifadhiwa?
questions.help_en: Visible mould or damaged grain means the problem is already active. Remove affected grain from the food chain.
questions.help_sw: Ukungu unaoonekana au nafaka iliyoharibika inamaanisha tatizo tayari liko. Ondoa nafaka iliyoathirika kutoka kwenye msururu wa chakula.

questions.question_en: Is the stored grain in direct contact with walls or floor?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka iliyohifadhiwa inagusa moja kwa moja ukuta au sakafu?
questions.help_en: Grain touching walls or floors picks up moisture from the structure. Use pallets or racks.
questions.help_sw: Nafaka inapogusa ukuta au sakafu huchukua unyevu kutoka kwenye muundo. Tumia matandiko au rafu.

questions.question_en: Was the grain transported uncovered or exposed to rain during transit?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka ilisafirishwa bila kufunikwa au kukumbwa na mvua wakati wa usafirishaji?
questions.help_en: Rain exposure during transport re-wets dry grain, undoing all previous drying effort.
questions.help_sw: Kukumbwa na mvua wakati wa usafirishaji kunaweza kulowesha tena nafaka kavu, ikibatilisha juhudi zote za ukaushaji.

questions.question_en: Was the transport vehicle visibly dirty or contaminated from previous loads?
questions.question_sw: Je, gari la kusafiria lilikuwa na uchafu unaoonekana au lilichafuka kutoka kwa shehena za awali?
questions.help_en: A dirty vehicle can introduce mould spores and pests to the grain load.
questions.help_sw: Gari chafu linaweza kuleta viini vya ukungu na wadudu kwenye shehena ya nafaka.

questions.question_en: Is the grain at the market or trader point stored in damp or crowded conditions?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka kwenye soko au kwa mfanyabiashara inahifadhiwa kwenye mazingira yenye unyevu au msongamano?
questions.help_en: Crowded, damp market conditions allow mould to spread quickly between sacks.
questions.help_sw: Msongamano na unyevu sokoni huruhusu ukungu kuenea haraka kati ya magunia.

questions.question_en: Are visibly mouldy or damaged sacks mixed with clean ones?
questions.question_sw: Je, magunia yenye ukungu au uharibifu unaoonekana yanachanganywa na yale safi?
questions.help_en: Mixing affected grain with clean grain spreads contamination through the whole batch.
questions.help_sw: Kuchanganya nafaka iliyoathirika na nafaka safi kunaeneza uchafuzi kwenye kundi zima.

questions.question_en: Does the aggregation point lack a system to reject visibly mouldy or damaged grain at intake?
questions.question_sw: Je, sehemu ya kukusanyia haina utaratibu wa kukataa nafaka yenye ukungu au uharibifu unaoonekana wakati wa kupokea?
questions.help_en: Without rejection criteria, one bad batch can contaminate an entire collection.
questions.help_sw: Bila vigezo vya kukataa, kundi moja baya linaweza kuchafua mkusanyo mzima.

questions.question_en: Are different-quality batches stored together without separation?
questions.question_sw: Je, makundi yenye ubora tofauti yanahifadhiwa pamoja bila kutengwa?
questions.help_en: Mixing known good with unknown quality grain risks spreading contamination.
questions.help_sw: Kuchanganya nafaka nzuri na ile isiyojulikana ubora wake kuna hatari ya kueneza uchafuzi.

questions.question_en: Is livestock feed stored in the same conditions as grain meant for human consumption?
questions.question_sw: Je, chakula cha mifugo kinahifadhiwa katika hali sawa na nafaka ya matumizi ya binadamu?
questions.help_en: Feed often has higher moisture tolerance, which can create mould that spreads to nearby grain.
questions.help_sw: Chakula cha mifugo mara nyingi huvumilia unyevu zaidi, jambo linaloweza kusababisha ukungu kuenea kwenye nafaka iliyo karibu.

questions.question_en: Is there visible mould or musty smell in the feed storage area?
questions.question_sw: Je, kuna ukungu unaoonekana au harufu ya ukungu katika eneo la kuhifadhia chakula cha mifugo?
questions.help_en: Musty feed is a strong indicator of aflatoxin risk. Avoid feeding mouldy grain to livestock.
questions.help_sw: Chakula cha mifugo chenye harufu ya ukungu ni dalili kubwa ya hatari ya aflatoksini. Epuka kulisha mifugo nafaka yenye ukungu.

questions.question_en: Are dairy animals being fed grain that shows signs of mould or spoilage?
questions.question_sw: Je, mifugo ya maziwa inalishwa nafaka inayoonyesha dalili za ukungu au kuharibika?
questions.help_en: Mouldy feed given to dairy animals can carry aflatoxin into milk. Do not feed mouldy grain.
questions.help_sw: Chakula chenye ukungu kinachotolewa kwa mifugo ya maziwa kinaweza kuleta aflatoksini kwenye maziwa. Usilishe nafaka yenye ukungu.

questions.question_en: Is there any monitoring or awareness of aflatoxin risk in the household or cooperative milk supply?
questions.question_sw: Je, kuna ufuatiliaji au uelewa wowote wa hatari ya aflatoksini katika usambazaji wa maziwa kwenye kaya au ushirika?
questions.help_en: Awareness is the first prevention step. Knowing the grain-feed-milk link makes earlier action more likely.
questions.help_sw: Uelewa ndiyo hatua ya kwanza ya kuzuia. Kujua uhusiano wa nafaka, chakula na maziwa hurahisisha kuchukua hatua mapema.
